case_title: PATRICIA DE LARIOS VS. HULU, LLC

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-25-2022 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-25-2022 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF PATRICIA DE LARIOS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT HULU, LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE LARIOS, PATRICIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HULU, LLC $560.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: 1505 CORP 538 CORPORATION SERVICE CO. DBA CSC-LAWYERS INCORPORATING SERVICE) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE LARIOS, PATRICIA AS TO DEFENDANT HULU, LLC
